nasb.text: If a ransom is demanded of him, then he shall give for the redemption of his life whatever is demanded of him.

esv.text: If a ransom is imposed on him, then he shall give for the redemption of his life whatever is imposed on him.

cnv.text: 如果給他提出贖金，他就必須照著提出的數量全數繳付贖命金。

ccb.text: 若判他以罚款抵命，不论金额多少，他都得照付。
